name: GPT-70B-MoE
_comment: Synthesized 70B-class MoE for the d-Matrix vs GB200 NVL72 Pareto comparison. Llama-3-style attention backbone (H=8192, n_q=64 heads at d_head=128, GQA n_kv=8) plus Mixtral-style 8-expert top-2 MoE per layer (I_moe=10240). Total params ~69B; FP4 size ~35 GB. Not a real published model — a clean reference point for SRAM-augmented architectures (sram.md §3.2-§3.3) where the 1.8T model is too big to keep weights resident even at full-SquadRack scale, but a 70B-class model can plausibly land partly in SRAM.
